# services.lk-jwt-service

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.lk-jwt-service`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.lk-jwt-service.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable lk-jwt-service. |
| `services.lk-jwt-service.keyFile` | `absolute path` | Path to a file containing the credential mapping (`<keyname>: <secret>`) to access LiveKit. Example: `lk-jwt-service: f6lQGaHtM5HfgZjIcec3cOCRfiDqIine4CpZZnqdT5cE` For more information, see <https://github.com/element-hq/lk-jwt-service#configuration>. |
| `services.lk-jwt-service.livekitUrl` | `string matching the pattern ^wss?://.*` | The public websocket URL for livekit. The proto needs to be either `wss://` (recommended) or `ws://` (insecure). |
| `services.lk-jwt-service.package` | `package` | The lk-jwt-service package to use. |
| `services.lk-jwt-service.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port that lk-jwt-service should listen on. |
